case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. EFRAIN ARAUZ DOMINGUEZ

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $50.00) SERVED AUG-26-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DOMINGUEZ, EFRAIN ARAUZ
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) LUPE ACEVEDO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DOMINGUEZ, EFRAIN ARAUZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-26-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-26-2019 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., REPRESENTED BY LUPE ACEVEDO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EFRAIN ARAUZ DOMINGUEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CURTIS E. A. KARNOW; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOMINGUEZ, EFRAIN ARAUZ $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
